allow: PowerShell($routes = @\('/', '/xodus', '/voice', '/uploads', '/fitness'\) ; foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing ; "$r -> $\($res.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$r -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($path in @\('/manifest.json', '/sw.js'\)\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$path" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing ; "$path -> $\($res.StatusCode\) \($\($res.Headers['Content-Type']\)\)" } catch { "$path -> ERROR" } })

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = ['Footprints','PersonStanding','Waves','Bike','Activity','Dumbbell']; names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, n in l ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\)\)")
